column2: p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = hour, y = scheduled_departures,
color = day_type, group = day_type, text = hover)) +
aes(x = hour, y = scheduled_departures, group = day_type),
title = "Yamanote — Frequency (total scheduled departures by hour)",

yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, fixedrange = TRUE, zeroline = FALSE)
